kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\QAx\\projects\\smartbit-robot\\web\\logs\\browser\\traces\\temp\\cf3e5f1e-c82c-4db6-8d08-0bed7bde2246"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL http://localhost:3000/login
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'sac@smartbit.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'pwd123' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button >> text=Entrar'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${element} = css=.logged-user
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=.logged-user at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'sac@smartbit.com'
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

kw.name: Login with verify notice
Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL http://localhost:3000/login
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button >> text=Entrar'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${element} = css=form .notice
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=form .notice at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'Os campos email e senha são obrigatórios.'
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.arg: Os campos email e senha são obrigatórios.

kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '12' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '2030' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '123' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button[type=submit] >> text=Cadastrar'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${selector} = .Toastify__toast-body
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector .Toastify__toast-body at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'O usuário já possui matrícula.'
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

suite.doc: Suíte de testes de adesões de planos

test.name: Deve iniciar o cadastro do cliente

Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${account} = {'name': 'Gabriel Maues', 'email': 'maues@gmail.com', 'cpf': ''}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'Faça seu cadastro e venha para a Smartbit!'
kw.arg: Faça seu cadastro e venha para a Smartbit!
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Gabriel Maues' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'maues@gmail.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button >> text=Cadastrar'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${element} = css=form .notice
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=form .notice at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'Por favor, informe o seu CPF'
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.arg: Por favor, informe o seu CPF

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

suite.name: Slogan

test.name: Deve exibir o Slogan na Landing Page

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: Switching browser to browser=f80a58b2-6c9c-4290-95ca-0e5a3192c34f
Successfully changed active browser: browser=f80a58b2-6c9c-4290-95ca-0e5a3192c34f
Reusing existing browser with id: browser=f80a58b2-6c9c-4290-95ca-0e5a3192c34f
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'Sua Jornada Fitness Começa aqui!'
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

suite.doc: Teste para verificar o Slogan da Smartbit na WebApp
